_note: Catalog harvested LIVE 2026-06-11 (docs/phase-3/portal-research/wits.md 'Live spike findings'). selector = the stable PeopleSoft element id. `manual` fields are driven by dedicated adapter flows (Create Application ID + captcha, emailed login, school/address modals, the subject grids, programme picks, uploads, indemnity), not the generic filler. university_id is resolved at wiring time from the universities row (seeded ids are uuid4).

fields.label: *Nationality
fields.help_text: defaults to South Africa; auto-sets National ID Type

fields.label: *Date of Birth (Day/Month/Year)
fields.help_text: three controls: Day dropdown ('12'), Month dropdown ('03 - March'), Year text — split from dd/mm/yyyy by the adapter

fields.label: *Email Address
fields.help_text: Wits emails the Temporary ID + temp password here (body markers 'TEMPORARY ACCESS ID:' / 'PASSWORD:'); the EmailChallengeSource reads/relays them. Spike temp password was the DOB as yymmdd.

fields.label: *Country Code / Mobile Phone
fields.help_text: the +27 country code is a separate prefilled input; this (unlabelled) input takes the national digits without the leading 0

fields.label: *Security Code
fields.help_text: six whose filenames spell the answer (VC_L_Y_1.JPG -> y) — decoded from the DOM, same scheme as UP; vision solver fallback

fields.label: School (Select School modal)
fields.help_text: modal: search #VC_OA_WRK_SEARCH_KEY + #VC_OA_WRK_SEARCH_BTN, result rows VC_OA_WRK_SELECT$n

fields.label: Examining Authority
fields.help_text: plain province names (not '<province> DoE' like UP)

fields.label: Final Grade 11 Results + Grade 12 Subjects
fields.help_text: Gr11: 10 rows VC_OA_STG_SEDG_SCHOOL_CRSE_NBR$n (156 options, names truncated ~30 chars) + mark VC_OA_STG_SEDG_VC_GRADE$n. Gr12 (REQUIRED, min 5 subjects, even for Current Grd 12): 'Copy Grade 11 Subjects' #VC_OA_WRK_VC_COPY_GR11_SUBJ. Eligibility ('subject requirements') is checked against the Gr12 list at Validate.

fields.label: Do you have any previous or current tertiary studies, including at Wits?
fields.help_text: unchecked = No (right for matriculants)

fields.label: Programme 1 - Academic Program
fields.help_text: 62 open programmes ('EFA01 - Bachelor of Science in Engineering (Civil)'). RENDER QUIRK: only the last block is visible on first render — the adapter kicks the cascade then targets PROG1. The Academic Plan (VC_OA_WRK_VC_ACAD_PLAN1, single option) must be explicitly selected. Eligibility is enforced at Validate Application (msg 'You do not meet the subject requirements for <code>'), not at selection.

fields.label: Suburb (+ Address Search link)
fields.help_text: type the suburb then #VC_OA_WRK_ADDRESS_LOOKUP -> modal rows VC_OA_WRK_SELECT$n (Suburb|City|Postal|Province); selection fills the read-only City/Postal Code/Province

fields.label: Postal Code (auto-filled by Address Search)
fields.help_text: used to disambiguate Address Search rows (e.g. Soshanguve East appears with 0152 and 0164)

fields.label: Population Group
fields.help_text: 'Black', not 'African' — the mapping converts

fields.label: Home Language
fields.help_text: large list (Afrikaans ... isiZulu, incl. 'Bilingual English/Afrikaans')

fields.label: Religious Affiliation
fields.help_text: 'Nil Declared' is the non-answer default (also 'No Religious Affiliation')

fields.label: Do you have a Disability?
fields.help_text: Yes reveals the detailed toggle list — a doc'd profile capture gap

fields.label: Country Code / Mobile Phone
fields.help_text: MUST differ from the applicant's mobile (portal-enforced)

fields.label: Relationship to Applicant
fields.help_text: Aunt/Brother/.../Father/Guardian/Mother/...

fields.label: Email Address
fields.help_text: optional; MUST differ from the applicant's email — dropped when identical

fields.label: Use same details as Next of Kin
fields.help_text: ticking hides the name/phone inputs (copied server-side); Relationship (#VC_OA_STG_EMER_RELATIONSHIP) still needs a value

fields.label: Accept (legal declaration of indemnity and undertaking)
fields.help_text: an Accept link (SCC agreement framework); surfaced to the student per the consent decision — the bot accepts only with agreement_consent_at recorded

fields.label: Copy of ID Document/Passport
fields.help_text: File Attachment modal: My Device #PT_ATTACH_BUTTON_DEF (differs from UP) -> chooser -> Upload [id='#ICUpload'] -> 'Upload Complete' -> Done [id='#ICOK']

fields.label: Final GR11 Results
fields.help_text: the row label for Current Grd 12 applicants is 'Final GR11 Results' (not the matric certificate)

fields.label: Submit Application to the University
fields.help_text: final submit — no edits after; the R100 fee is paid post-submission (FNB EFT 63075484302 / 251905 / FIRNZAJJ, person/student number as reference)
